Message.title: Visitor Message
Message.description: Visitor inquiries and feedback submitted via the Ask Sauvik AI interface

name.description: The custom name specified by the user

email.description: Valid email address of the visitor

message.description: Detailed text content of the visitor inquiry

timestamp.description: Firestore server timestamp of when the entry was submitted

sourceWebsite.description: Identifier for origin of submission (e.g. sauvikdev.in)

status.description: Read status of client inquiry in the admin portal
